successCriteria.description: src/shared/types/leave.types.ts exists and exports a LeaveType string enum with exactly three values: ANNUAL, SICK, EMERGENCY
src/shared/types/leave.types.ts exists and exports a LeaveStatus string enum with exactly four values: PENDING, APPROVED, REJECTED, CANCELLED
tests/unit/shared/types/leave.types.test.ts exists with Jest tests that verify every LeaveType and LeaveStatus enum value is defined and the enums contain the correct number of members
No files other than src/shared/types/leave.types.ts and tests/unit/shared/types/leave.types.test.ts are created or modified in this phase

constraints: LeaveType and LeaveStatus must be TypeScript string enums (not const enums, not union types) — this is the canonical form expected by all downstream phases
The file must be at the exact path src/shared/types/leave.types.ts — this path is referenced by every subsequent phase in PLAN.md and ARCHITECTURE.md
The test file must be at tests/unit/shared/types/leave.types.test.ts and use Jest (the declared test framework in HARNESS.json)
No other files are created or modified — this phase is scoped exclusively to the two files listed
outOfScope: Phase 6 — Leave module model and repository
Phase 7 — Leave module service with workflow orchestration
Phase 8 — Leave module Zod validation schemas
Phase 10 — Leave module Fastify routes and app registration
